title: Transaction Safety
concept: Blocking agents from executing destructive real-world actions like purchasing, deleting accounts, or submitting forms.

exercises.prompt: What does a User-Agent help protect when you are online?

options.text: It helps identify your browser and device.
It prevents viruses from your computer.

exercises.explain: A User-Agent helps identify your browser and device, making it important for online safety.

cards.title: Understanding Transaction Safety
cards.body: Transaction safety means preventing harmful actions from happening online, like unwanted purchases or deleted accounts.

cards.title: What is Transaction Safety?
cards.body: Transaction safety ensures that only safe, intentional actions are allowed, protecting users from harmful outcomes.

cards.title: Traffic Lights and Transactions
cards.body: Just like traffic lights control cars to prevent accidents, transaction safety controls online actions to prevent unwanted results.

cards.title: Example of Transaction Safety
cards.body: If someone tries to buy something without your permission, transaction safety blocks that action.

cards.title: Myth: All AI Agents Can Make Purchases
cards.body: Not all AI agents are allowed to make purchases; many are restricted to ensure safety.

cards.title: Blocking Harmful Actions
cards.body: Transaction safety is like a security guard, stopping dangerous actions from happening.

exercises.prompt: What is one purpose of transaction safety for online agents?

options.text: To block harmful actions like unauthorized purchases.

exercises.explain: Transaction safety's purpose is to block harmful actions, such as unauthorized purchases.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Transaction safety allows any agent to make purchases online without restrictions.
exercises.explain: Transaction safety actually restricts agents from making purchases to protect users.

exercises.prompt: Transaction safety is important to prevent ______ actions from happening.
exercises.sentence: Transaction safety is important to prevent harmful actions from happening.
exercises.explain: The correct term is 'harmful actions' since transaction safety is meant to block any unwanted actions.

exercises.prompt: Which option describes what transaction safety does?

options.text: It allows agents to delete user accounts freely.
It blocks unwanted purchases that could cause harm.

exercises.explain: Transaction safety is designed to block unwanted purchases to ensure user protection.

exercises.prompt: What is the main goal of transaction safety for AI agents?

options.text: To let AIs access any account without permission.
To ensure only authorized transactions happen and protect users.
To make web pages load faster.

exercises.explain: The main goal of transaction safety is to ensure only authorized transactions happen, protecting users from unwanted actions.
